titleStmt.title: SII 35.186: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 186. (A.R. No. 207 of 1951-52.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall Prākara, proper left jamb at the western entrance into the Chandana-maṇḍapa.

This inscription is dated in Śaka 1413, Virōdhikrit, Phālguṇa, śu. 10, Monday. These details are irregular. If śu. 10 is a mistake for śu. 1, the details regularly correspond to 1492 A.D., February 8.
Registers a gift of four villages Kōramaṅgala, Ariyamaṅgalapaṭṭi and two other village (name not clear) as sarvamānya to the god for feeding Brāhmaṇas daily at Śrīraṅga. The donor's name is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīvijayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa
1413 neya virōdhikratusaṁvatsarada pālgu
ṇa su 10 sō . lū śrīraṁganāthadēvarige hari
tasagōtrada rukhuśākheya
roṁḍu nama māḍuva Avasara
vāgi mūṟujāva lu harivāṇava
11 tithiyau
nāḷigeU śrīraṁgadalu yippattu
maṁdi brāhmaṇa bhōjanakeU koṭadu maḷanāḍa
keḷa kōramaṁgalagrāma 1 jiyiḍe Uragrā
yeḍeyā maṁgala
da grāma 1 Ariyamaṁgala paṭinaya nāṭamaṁga
lada grāma 1 rājagaṁbhīravaḷunāḍa karumūrugrāma
dalū sērsida bīḍuvēli 4 vaḷadilaṁbiṭṭina cauḍaḍiya yeḍe
yāṟa nakavaliyagrāma 1 Aṁntu grāma 4 bi
ḍuvalli vatsarada phālguṇa su 11 Ārabhyavā
gi śrīraṁganāthadēvarige sa¨rvvamāṁnyavāgi paṭeyavanu
koṭivāgi yīdha¨rmavanū Ā caṁdrā¨rkkasthāyi Āgina
ḍisu Ārobaru Ahita
vanenasiredeLine 20-30 are in the side
Ubhaya kā
vēriya madhya
dalū śrīraṁ
ganāthadēvara
saṁnidhiyali
taṁma tāI
taṁdeya
koṁda pā
padalu po
gauḷavaru
Digital edition of SII 35.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
